# activate()

**Instance Method**

Applies settings to the designated groups.

## Declaration

```swift
func activate()
```

## Discussion

When you call this function, the framework assigns the group preset as the engine’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/activeGroupPreset] and deactivates the previous assignee, as needed. The settings take effect according to [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEGroupPreset/timeToTarget].

## Activating a Group Preset

- **activate(timeToTargetOverride:)**: Applies settings with an overriden fade duration.

items.description: Applies settings with an overriden fade duration.
items.name: activate(timeToTargetOverride:)
